reviews.review_description: This game is a pc port. It’s got features that are more pc forward. This would include intense physics. So don’t go hating on the free version because physics suck. It’s a pc port, and a demo. It’s meant for you to get a taste of the game. If you don’t like it then play the actual one where the physics and weapons are more polished. The game may be jank but they’ve been working on it for a long time and the new dlc/ update is coming out soon. So chill.

reviews.review_title: Just Awful (you should try it anyway)
reviews.review_description:
Only in the content starved world of VR could a game like this receive so many glowing reviews.

However since some people are able to look past the primitive graphics and deal with the jank to fall in love with the game I recommend everyone download this demo and give it a go.  You have nothing to lose but time.

This game is unpolished to an epic level.

Simply selecting something from a menu with a laser pointer feels janky. (How on earth could they mess this up?)

Information boxes are pinned to the screen as if you were playing a flat screen game on a TV.

Graphics look terrible, like a flatscreen game from decades ago.

Inventory systems are clunky and very un-VR like.

Sound effects come from the wrong places.

The combat is janky and unconvincing.

I could go on listing issues, but I won't. It's free so you should experience it and judge for yourself.
I like it and its a good game but 2 things that need to be changed 1 fix the pc movement 2 get rid of the dark.

Everything about this is pretty awful. It looks rough, it's cumbersome, it doesn't work properly, physics are terrible etc. I can't believe they have a full version at the price point it's currently at when it so far removed from some of the other titles out that there that do everything so much better.

Underneath it all, there's an idea for a fairly decent game but absolutely not in its current state.

reviews.review_title: It's PC game moving over, not VR feature
reviews.review_description:
The design seems to be based on PC gamers' habits, I think, that's why I don't play PC games.
● Relies on so many buttons to press to perform.
● The menu (equip/talent skills...) has too many requiring management.
In addition, 
● The physics is not so good, difficult to perform.
Note: 
I heard so much praise for this game, that's why I gave it a try.
● By the way, the full version is pricey!

reviews.review_title: Absolute must have for action RPG fans!
reviews.review_description:
I absolutely adore this game and have loved it since long before it was brought to the quest. Im saving up for this one. Great rpg mechanics integrated phenomenally with vr. Its not without some jank, but that can be smoothed over with time. The combat feels amazing. And nothing hits me with some old vr nostalgia like hearing that classic music. 

The developers have stuck with this for years and finally got this on the quest store. You owe it to yourself to give it a try, and then buy it!

The game launched recently and is receiving very positive reviews, but the game's physics are incredibly weak compared to Blade and Sorcerer. The only major plus is the Polish language. But such a price for a game that doesn't compare to Blade and Sorcerer? Game Play is extremely stiff, there are currently much better games at a similar price, unless you want to support small developers

It is not the best game… but if I have to be perfectly honest it is pretty fun to play even though you can’t get most items.  I would not recommend getting the full version for the price it is at instead just get this one/the free one￼.

This is nothing but an instruction manual masquerading as “gameplay testing.”

If this is how they treat people with junk “prologues,” the no thanks. Uninstalled and one star earned.

I was iffy on buying the full game but with this I have no doub anymore. THIS GAME IS GREAT! The systems are deep and rich and there is a learning curve in how to do certain things but once it’s learned it’s so much fun, play this demo and then if you like it buy the full game, I know I am

Got the full game after finishing the demo. The actual game has a lot more beef!

Look, I was initially unimpressed with physics and all the menus. But this game has a lot more substance than the mere ragdoll-chopping VR arenas - it needs menus to handle the extra complexity. The good news is that they devised some very handy shortcuts for slot menus and after awhile playing it becomes very natural and gesture-based.

It's a full VR action RPG soulslike. Download this demo and check it yourself.

This game made my day when I found it although the created of this game took the music straight from the first Diablo game and the game play reminds me of blade and sorcery but other then that the game was awesome and I would recommend for other players looking for something new.￼

Ok, the game idea is really good it has a vintage pc action rpg vibes and has a lot of things you can do (skills,drops,crafting) and a lot of different styles, BUT.
It’s chunky and REALLY expensive for it development state, that price could jeopardize the entire game.
Lower the full game price since it’s an early development, build an in-game feedback system and  polish the game with the user feedback. 
I really like the prologue but for that price I would never buy the full game at this state.
When finished it may value 25€ not more

The only things I dislike about the game is sometimes my weapons dont go where they are meant to or not pick up and get stuck inside enemies (mostly the poleaxe I use) Its a PC port so not everything's going to work greatly but its still a fun game.
The game isn’t even that bad just need to work on the stabbing o piercing but the game is anyway supposed to be played on pcvr

So this seems good but unfortunately in sitting mode I cant reach things on the ground. Theres a chest in the tutorial that I cant reach and open so I decided to give up. I was hoping to buy the full game but if I cant open chests I can't justify buying.
It’s so fun ya there can be mean people but the game itself is so fun I love the animations in the game and the way you pick up weapons are super cool 100% recommend
This game was soooooo bad nothing i tried to do worked i is over 3gb for absolutely nothing good would not recomend
This is a really cool as game with amazing graphics! I hope the developers put more add-ons in it with more game time play with it as well!
I HAVE TO PAY FOR IT?!!
i only played the demo but i can alredy tell that this game is a masterpiece, the price is high but you get high game experience, im going to buy this masterpiece
Combat is really satisfying and the bones of the game are fantastic. It’s not without issues, but you’re bound to have a good time with it if you enjoyed games like Blade and Sorcery.

reviews.review_title: nice game to play( you should try it )
reviews.review_description: best game i've ever played in my life because of one reason only the sick game
So as of right now there is zero active multiplayer lobbys yet it is on global but its a good game anyway battle talent might get a rival you
Amazing
Got to the hammer part of the tutorial and cant figer out what to do ne. I cant even find a YT video on it
It do good

the app keeps splitting the codes into parts so I can’t use them￼😭 but the physics are great, the weapons feels good most of the time, the combat is satisfying, and the black smithing is fun, thinking about getting the full game!!
Love
